query:
SELECT a.id, a.nome, a.email, a.onboardingStatus, a.onboardingCompletedAt, a.consultorId 
FROM alunos a 
WHERE a.nome LIKE '%Julia%Makiyama%'
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT a.id, a.nome, a.email, a.onboardingStatus, a.onboardingCompletedAt, a.consultorId 
FROM alunos a 
WHERE a.nome LIKE '%Julia%Makiyama%'
logs: ERROR 1054 (42S22) at line 1: Unknown column 'a.nome' in 'where clause'
